zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Tancarville於大約1090年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾時，她的父親Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre30歲，母親Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques34歲。她於1112年與William FitzRichard de Vernon在英國爾諾維其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1165年7月26日在英國英格蘭爾希布盧可享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Tancarville于大约1090年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾时，她的父亲Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre30岁，母亲Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques34岁。她于1112年与William FitzRichard de Vernon在英国爾諾維其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1165年7月26日在英国英格兰爾希布盧可享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Tancarville was born about 1090, in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre, was 30 and her mother, Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques, was 34. She married William FitzRichard de Vernon in 1112, in Northwich, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 July 1165, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Tancarville est née environ 1090, à Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé William FitzRichard de Vernon en 1112, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1165, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Tancarville um 1090 in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre 30 und ihre Mutter Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques 34. Sie hat 1112 in Northwich, Cheshire, England William FitzRichard de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1165 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Tancarville è nata il circa 1090 nel Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato William FitzRichard de Vernon nel 1112, nel Northwich, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1165, nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Tancarvilleが約1090年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメタンカーヴィルで生まれた時，父Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterreは30歳，母Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arquesは34歳であった。1112年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチでWilliam FitzRichard de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1165年7月26日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Tancarville(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 탠카빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1112년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 William FitzRichard de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 7월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 시브룩에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Tancarville nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com William FitzRichard de Vernon em 1112, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1165, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Tancarville родилась около 1090 г. в местности танкарвилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William FitzRichard de Vernon в 1112 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 июля 1165 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Tancarville nació aproximadamente 1090, en Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume I de Tancarville - Chamberlain d'Normandie et d'Angleterre, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mathilda 'Maud' D'Arques, tenía 34 años. Se casó con William FitzRichard de Vernon en 1112, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1165, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
